query:
-- Map time-based timeSlot to bookingSlot:
-- утро: before 12:00 (e.g. 08:00, 10:00, 11:59)
-- обед: 12:00 - 16:59 (e.g. 12:00, 14:00, 16:30)
-- вечер: 17:00 and later (e.g. 17:00, 18:00, 20:00, 18:05)
-- Also handle text values: утро/обед/вечер directly

UPDATE sale_records
SET bookingSlot = CASE
  -- Direct text matches
  WHEN LOWER(timeSlot) IN ('утро', 'утром') THEN 'утро'
  WHEN LOWER(timeSlot) IN ('обед', 'днём', 'день') THEN 'обед'
  WHEN LOWER(timeSlot) IN ('вечер', 'вечером') THEN 'вечер'
  -- Time-based: extract hour from HH:MM or HH.MM format
  WHEN timeSlot REGEXP '^[0-9]{1,2}[:\.][0-9]{2}' THEN
    CASE
      WHEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(REPLACE(timeSlot, '.', ':'), ':', 1) AS UNSIGNED) < 12 THEN 'утро'
      WHEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(REPLACE(timeSlot, '.', ':'), ':', 1) AS UNSIGNED) < 17 THEN 'обед'
      ELSE 'вечер'
    END
  ELSE NULL
END
WHERE bookingSlot IS NULL AND timeSlot IS NOT NULL AND timeSlot != '';

      WHEN CAST(SUBSTRING_INDEX(REPLACE(timeSlot, '.', ':'), ':', 1) AS UNSIGNED) < 17 THEN 'обед'
